_ngcontent-jyi-c1="" _nghost-jyi-c6="" class="ng-tns-c6-8 ng-tns-c1-7 ng-star-inserted"><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-jyi-c6="" class="blz-page-content-view__content ng-trigger ng-trigger-loadingFade"><blz-page-view-title _ngcontent-jyi-c6="" class="ng-tns-c6-8" _nghost-jyi-c17=""><!----><blz-page-title _ngcontent-jyi-c17="" class="blz-page-title ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><h1 class="blz-page-title__headline ng-star-inserted"><!----><!----><!----> World of Warcraft Game Data APIs <!----><!----></h1><!----><!----><!----><!----><div class="blz-page-title__actions"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!----></blz-page-title></blz-page-view-title><blz-page-view-description _ngcontent-jyi-c6="" class="ng-tns-c6-8" style=""><!----><!----><!----><!----><app-api-reference-page-content _ngcontent-jyi-c25="" _nghost-jyi-c26="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----><!----><app-html-page-content _ngcontent-jyi-c26="" _nghost-jyi-c27="" class="ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><!----><blz-page-section _ngcontent-jyi-c27="" class="blz-page-section blz-page-section--extra-spacing ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-jyi-c27="" apphandlecontentclicks="" class="document-content document-headers"><p>The World of Warcraft game data APIs encompass both static and dynamic game data. For more information about static and dynamic game data, see <a href="/documentation/world-of-warcraft/guides/namespaces">World of Warcraft Namespaces</a>.</p>
<h2 id="host-names">Host Names</h2>
<p>For all regions except China, the API host name follows the format <code>{region}.api.blizzard.com</code>, where <strong>{region}</strong> is one of <strong>us</strong> | <strong>eu</strong> | <strong>kr</strong> | <strong>tw</strong>. For China, the host name is <code>gateway.battlenet.com.cn</code>. For more information, see <a href="/documentation/guides/regionality-and-apis">Regionality and APIs</a>.</p>


<h2 id="namespaces">Namespaces</h2>
<p>The World of Warcraft game data APIs </p><p>require a namespace as part of every request. Each endpoint below lists the correct namespace to use as a parameter. A namespace can be submitted as a header (<code>Battlenet-Namespace: {namespace}</code>) or as a query parameter (<code>?namespace={namespace}</code>). For more information, see <a href="/documentation/world-of-warcraft/guides/namespaces">World of Warcraft Namespaces</a>.</p>
<p></p>
<h2 id="search">Search</h2>
<p>Certain data types in the World of Warcraft game data APIs support search. See <a href="/documentation/world-of-warcraft/guides/search">Search</a> for more information.</p>
<h2 id="apis">APIs</h2>
<p>World of Warcraft supports the following game data APIs. For information about using the APIs, see <a href="/documentation/guides/getting-started">Getting Started</a>.</p>

_ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="mat-expansion-panel-header ng-tns-c44-38 ng-trigger ng-trigger-expansionHeight ng-star-inserted mat-expanded" collapsedheight="64px" expandedheight="64px" role="button" _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="mat-expansion-panel-header-title"><div _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="method-title"><code _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="method-type" color="primary">GET</code><div _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="method-details"><div _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="method-name"> Auctions </div><div _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="method-request-info blz-text-hint"><div _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" class="blz-text-ellipsis">
                  /data/wow/connected-realm/{connectedRealmId}/auctions
                </div></div></div></div></mat-panel-title></span><!----><span class="mat-expansion-indicator ng-tns-c44-38 ng-trigger ng-trigger-indicatorRotate ng-star-inserted" style="transform: rotate(180deg);"></span></mat-expansion-panel-header><div class="mat-expansion-panel-content ng-trigger ng-trigger-bodyExpansion" role="region" aria-labelledby="mat-expansion-panel-header-5" id="cdk-accordion-child-5" style="visibility: visible;"><div class="mat-expansion-panel-body"><app-api-reference-method _ngcontent-jyi-c42="" _nghost-jyi-c45=""><form _ngcontent-jyi-c45="" class="api-reference-method ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-valid" novalidate=""><!----><section _ngcontent-jyi-c45="" appdocumentlinks="" class="method-description ng-star-inserted" style=""><p>Returns all active auctions for a connected realm.<br><br>See the <strong>Connected Realm API</strong> for information about retrieving a list of connected realm IDs.<br><br>Auction house data updates at a set interval. The value was initially set at 1 hour; however, it might change over time without notice.<br><br>Depending on the number of active auctions on the specified connected realm, the response from this endpoint may be rather large, sometimes exceeding 10 MB.</p>

<!-- battlenet nav -->
<script>
  (function () {
    document.addEventListener('blz-nav:cms-loaded', (event) => {
      const [accountDropdown] = event?.detail?.cmsContent?.filter((el) => el?.id === 'account')
      accountDropdown.querySelector('#blz-nav-battlenet').icon = "battlenet"
      accountDropdown.querySelector('#blz-nav-log-out').href = "/login/logout?ref=%2F"
  })})();
</script>
